title: Refine UI buttons and add multi-payment/multi-invoice support

requirements.summary: Reduce size and simplify styling of Clear Records and Download Excel buttons in PaymentReportTable
acceptanceCriteria: Both Clear Records and Download Excel buttons are visually smaller than current implementation
Button styling is simplified with minimal padding and compact text
Buttons remain touch-friendly for mobile devices

file_operations.description: Reduce button sizes by applying compact padding classes (e.g., px-2 py-1 text-sm) and simplified styling to both Clear Records and Download Excel buttons while maintaining minimum 44px touch targets for mobile accessibility

requirements.summary: Change Invoice Number field to accept both text and numeric input
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice Number field accepts alphanumeric input like 'INV-001', 'BILL123', or '12345'
Field validation allows mixed text and number formats
Existing numeric-only invoices continue to work

file_operations.description: Change the invoice number input field type from number to text to accept alphanumeric values, update validation to allow mixed text and number formats, and ensure compatibility with existing numeric invoice numbers

requirements.summary: Add ability to select multiple payment modes (NEFT and/or Cheque) for a single invoice, showing all relevant fields simultaneously
acceptanceCriteria: User can select one or both payment modes (NEFT, Cheque) for a single invoice
When both modes are selected, all NEFT fields and all Cheque fields are visible simultaneously
Form validates that at least one payment mode is selected
Submit saves each selected payment mode as a separate record with the same invoice number

file_operations.description: Replace single payment mode dropdown with checkbox selection allowing multiple modes (NEFT and/or Cheque), render all selected payment mode fields simultaneously, add validation requiring at least one mode selection, and prepare paymentModes array data structure with separate entries for each selected mode when submitting to backend

requirements.summary: Add ability to enter multiple invoice numbers for a single payment transaction
acceptanceCriteria: User can input multiple invoice numbers (comma-separated or multi-select field)
Single payment details (Transaction ID, Amount, Bank Name, etc.) apply to all entered invoices
Submit creates separate payment records for each invoice number with the same payment details
Form clearly indicates that one payment is being split across multiple invoices

file_operations.description: Convert invoice number field to accept comma-separated values or multiple entries, add helper text indicating one payment applies to multiple invoices, parse and validate multiple invoice number entries, and submit invoiceNumbers array to backend where each invoice gets the same payment mode details
